scripts.create-hitas: cross-env VITE_PROJECT_OWNERSHIP_TYPE=hitas VITE_SHOW_UPCOMING_ONLY=false npm run build
scripts.create-hitas-upcoming: cross-env VITE_PROJECT_OWNERSHIP_TYPE=hitas VITE_SHOW_UPCOMING_ONLY=true npm run build
scripts.create-haso: cross-env VITE_PROJECT_OWNERSHIP_TYPE=haso VITE_SHOW_UPCOMING_ONLY=false npm run build
scripts.create-haso-upcoming: cross-env VITE_PROJECT_OWNERSHIP_TYPE=haso VITE_SHOW_UPCOMING_ONLY=true npm run build
scripts.copy-files:hitas: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/react/hitas', {recursive:true})" && cp build/assets/js/main.*.chunk.js dist/react/hitas/asu_react_main.js && cp build/assets/js/vendor.temp.chunk.js dist/react/hitas/asu_react_vendors.js && cp build/assets/js/runtime-main.temp.js dist/react/hitas/asu_react_runtime-main.js && cp build/assets/css/main.*.css dist/react/hitas/asu_react_main.css
scripts.copy-files:hitas-upcoming: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/react/hitas_upcoming', {recursive:true})" && cp build/assets/js/main.*.chunk.js dist/react/hitas_upcoming/asu_react_main.js && cp build/assets/js/vendor.temp.chunk.js dist/react/hitas_upcoming/asu_react_vendors.js && cp build/assets/js/runtime-main.temp.js dist/react/hitas_upcoming/asu_react_runtime-main.js && cp build/assets/css/main.*.css dist/react/hitas_upcoming/asu_react_main.css
scripts.copy-files:haso: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/react/haso', {recursive:true})" && cp build/assets/js/main.*.chunk.js dist/react/haso/asu_react_main.js && cp build/assets/js/vendor.temp.chunk.js dist/react/haso/asu_react_vendors.js && cp build/assets/js/runtime-main.temp.js dist/react/haso/asu_react_runtime-main.js && cp build/assets/css/main.*.css dist/react/haso/asu_react_main.css
scripts.copy-files:haso-upcoming: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/react/haso_upcoming', {recursive:true})" && cp build/assets/js/main.*.chunk.js dist/react/haso_upcoming/asu_react_main.js && cp build/assets/js/vendor.temp.chunk.js dist/react/haso_upcoming/asu_react_vendors.js && cp build/assets/js/runtime-main.temp.js dist/react/haso_upcoming/asu_react_runtime-main.js && cp build/assets/css/main.*.css dist/react/haso_upcoming/asu_react_main.css
scripts.dist: rimraf dist && npm run create-dist-package-folder && npm run create-hitas && npm run copy-files:hitas && npm run create-hitas-upcoming && npm run copy-files:hitas-upcoming && npm run create-haso && npm run copy-files:haso && npm run create-haso-upcoming && npm run copy-files:haso-upcoming && npm run create-zip
